description_long: Port City appears to be registered as a credit union based on the current category assignment and domain name (portcityfcu.com). However, the website is currently inaccessible due to a 403 Forbidden error, which prevents verification of the company's actual operations, membership requirements, services offered, and legitimacy. Without access to factual website content, an accurate company profile cannot be generated. The 403 error suggests either temporary server issues, geographic IP restrictions, authentication requirements, or potential domain problems. Any profile generated without verified website content would be speculative and violate the requirement to base all information on actual company documentation. To complete this profile accurately, the website must be accessible and reviewed for service offerings, membership eligibility, product types, and company history. Interested consumers should attempt to access the website directly or contact the company through alternative channels to verify current operations and service availability.
